calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2020 Continued To Dec-30-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Nov-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Xin Guo.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-0616. Email: nrodich@sftc.org.
Kurtiss Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank, N.A.
Martin Kokoska, Assistant Vice President and Custodian of Record for Citibank, N.A., was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Jacobs and Kokoska appeared telephonically via ZOOM Video Conference for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Xin Guo.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on December 19, 2019.
Substitute Service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Xin Guo occurred on January 18, 2020, and was effectuated on January 31, 2020.
Default as to defendant Xin Guo was entered on March 3, 2020.
There were no DOE defendants.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citibank, N.A., and against defendant Xin Guo, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $42,103.34 (Amount pled in complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - WAIVED.
Attorney Fees - WAIVED.
Costs - $515.00.

Total - $42,618.34.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Continued To Nov-17-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
